source_label: Baevski et al., 'data2vec: A General Framework for Self-supervised Learning in Speech, Vision and Language', Meta AI (arXiv 2202.03555)
notes: Meta AI cross-modal SSL that predicts its own latent representations (closest non-JEPA cousin in spirit); inherits the word2vec/wav2vec lineage, so '2' is 'to' and 'vec' is 'vek' ‚ÄĒ 'DAY-tuh-too-vek'.
